---
title: "Live Session NN: SESSION TITLE"
description: "ONE-SENTENCE DESCRIPTION"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
author:
  - AUTHOR NAME
date: "YYYY-MM-DD"
categories:
  - TOPIC
  - Live session
draft: true
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
execute:
  enabled: false
---

Introduce the session, its purpose, and what participants will be able to do.

::: {.callout-note title="Training materials"}
- [Download the session materials](AMMNET-MATERIALS-URL)
:::

## Learning objectives

By the end of the session, you will be able to:

1. LEARNING OBJECTIVE
2. LEARNING OBJECTIVE
3. LEARNING OBJECTIVE

## Before the session

List required background, software, packages, and setup steps.

## Session overview

Summarize the prepared lesson. Use static code fences for examples that do not
need to execute during the website build:

```r
# Prepared example code
```

## Resources

- [Descriptive resource name](RESOURCE-URL)
